name: Keerthana AI - Telegram Girlfriend Bot
description: Telegram AI girlfriend bot powered by Google Gemini with Tanglish conversation, referral system, and UPI payments.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Primary Google Gemini API key (get free at aistudio.google.com)

GEMINI_API_KEY_1.description: Optional: 2nd Gemini key for rotation (leave blank if not needed)

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name exactly as shown in the URL (e.g. my-app-name). Used to auto-register the Telegram webhook.

DASHBOARD_PASSWORD.description: Password to access the admin dashboard at /dashboard

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random secret for Flask session encryption (any long random string)

FORCE_SUB_CHANNEL.description: Optional: Telegram channel username (without @) users must join before chatting

PAYTM_MERCHANT_ID.description: Optional: Paytm merchant ID for UPI payment auto-verification

PAYTM_UPI_ID.description: Optional: Your UPI ID for receiving payments (e.g. yourname@paytm)
